name: Container
description: A responsive container component with predefined max-widths for consistent page layouts and content centering.
usage_guidelines: Choose size based on content width needs (sm, md, lg).
Use 'sm' for narrow content like articles or forms.

styling_info.visual_description: A centered container with horizontal margins and optional max-width constraints. Responsive padding adapts to screen size.

Do: Choose appropriate size for content type
